Bash(cmd.exe /c "C:\\\\Users\\\\Guilh\\\\anaconda3\\\\Scripts\\\\conda.exe run -n ENTER python -c \\"import pandas as pd; df=pd.read_csv\('data/banco_treino.csv'\); print\('SUB'\); print\(df.groupby\('Sub-assunto'\)['perde'].agg\(['mean','sum','count']\).round\(3\)\); print\('DOCS'\); docs=['tem_contrato','tem_extrato','tem_comprovante','tem_dossie','tem_demonstrativo','tem_laudo']; [print\(d, round\(\(1-df[df[d]==1]['perde'].mean\(\)\)*100,1\), round\(\(1-df[df[d]==0]['perde'].mean\(\)\)*100,1\)\) for d in docs]; print\('UF'\); uf=df.groupby\('UF'\)['perde'].mean\(\).sort_values\(ascending=False\).head\(10\).round\(3\); print\(uf\); print\('SCATTER'\); s=df[df['perde']==1][['Valor da causa','Valor da condenacao/indenizacao']].head\(30\); print\(s\)\\"")
